description: Minimal UnionTech AI point extraction workflow pack centered on the logged-in browser extraction skill
notes: Execution requires the user to already be logged into the UnionTech dashboard in a live browser session.
The executing agent must be able to operate the logged-in page and inspect authenticated XHR traffic.
Agents should verify the target page is open on the correct dashboard route before starting.
If login state, page access, or XHR interception capability is missing, agents should stop and report blocked instead of guessing.
